title: Exceptions to applicability
doc_html:
§4600.12. Exceptions to applicability

            The provisions of this Chapter shall not be applicable to the parishes of Jefferson and Orleans.

            Acts 2021, No. 319, §1, eff. June 15, 2021.
doc_text:
§4600.12.  Exceptions to applicability
The provisions of this Chapter shall not be applicable to the parishes of Jefferson and
Orleans.
Acts 2021, No. 319, §1, eff. June 15, 2021.
